headline_findings: REGRESSION/MISS: choice-marker normalization failure on pages 525 and 526. zh choices retain raw katakana (ア/イ/ウ/エ) and/or use Chinese ordinals (甲/乙/丙/丁) on 9 of 10 questions across the two pages. en column is mostly normalized. This contradicts the R9-C 'all fixed' status and is RELEASE-IMPACTING.

NEW DEFECTS on page 566 (terms): two CRITICAL upstream errors — surface 'ベストソリューションズ' should be 'ペネトレーションテスト'; surface 'シングルパスワード' should be 'ワンタイムパスワード'. Both have correct definitions but wrong headwords propagated to zh/en. Plus headword '完全' (should be '完全性'/Integrity), garbled リスクマネジメント definition, inverted デジタル署名 definition, ショルダーハック defined as the countermeasure only, hallucinated セキュリティ・バイ・デフォルト entry, and ネットトレース as biometric.
page 528: exam dropout (0 entities) — PASS per spec.

page 536, 561: term entries clean. Page 561 has one MEDIUM glossary collision: Housing Service and Hosting Service both translate to '主机托管服务' in zh, erasing the semantic distinction students must learn.

Page 566 issues are predominantly upstream of translation (OCR/structurer/Mistral cleaning); fixing requires re-running structurer with stricter source-fidelity prompts or manual term-table corrections, not just translation re-runs.
rule_d_compliance: Did not read v1_ocr/, iter_2/, iter_3/r9a*/, iter_3/r9b*/, v2_translation/, step_06_audit.md, or audit/stage6_review*.json. Fresh judgment from data/ canonical run only.
verdict_overall: R10 has NOT converged — release-impacting defects remain on 3 of 5 audited pages (page 528 is by-design empty).
